name: Button Debouncer
description: Debounces mechanical buttons or any noisy digital signal. Input must remain stable for STABLE_COUNT clock cycles before the output is updated. Essential for any design with physical buttons.
author: aazhi-ip-lib contributors

parameters.name: STABLE_COUNT
parameters.description: Stable cycles required before output updates

usage_note: For 50 MHz clk and 20 ms debounce time: STABLE_COUNT = 1_000_000. Adjust for your clock frequency and acceptable debounce window.
